daily.today_energy: Your emotional radar is extra sensitive today. Lean into that intuition—it's basically your superpower rn. The universe is asking you to trust what your gut's telling you, even if it doesn't make logical sense yet.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language today. Someone's ready to hear what you've been holding back. Single? That random conversation with someone unexpected might spark something real.
daily.career: Your creative energy is flowing hard. This is the day to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or tackle a project from a fresh angle. Your authenticity is your biggest asset at work right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Whether that's a slower workout, more water, or just giving yourself permission to rest—listen to what you need. Self-care isn't selfish, it's fuel.

weekly.overview: This week's energy feels like a gentle reset button for your soul. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity—no masks, no performances. Trust the quiet whispers of your intuition; they're basically your spiritual GPS right now.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, this is your moment to get real about what you actually want. Vulnerable conversations hit different right now. If you've been holding back, the universe is giving you a soft green light to speak your truth.
weekly.career: Your creative spark is lowkey unmatched this week. Channel that intuitive energy into your projects—your gut instincts about what works are basically spot-on. Don't overthink; your vibe is doing the heavy lifting for you.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Think cozy movement, hydration, and whatever makes you feel nourished from the inside out. Rest isn't laziness; it's fuel. Honor what your system needs without judgment.
